regime_fall.current_status: Following formal ceasefire expiry on April 19, 2026, the US and Iran are engaged in reciprocal military escalations including vessel seizures, blockade enforcement, and threat rhetoric, while Iran has withdrawn from scheduled Pakistan talks and hardliners consolidate control amid severe economic deterioration and internal instability.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US Navy seized and fired upon Iranian cargo ship 'Shoja 2' on April 19, 2026 for attempting to breach the naval blockade, prompting Iran to declare the action a ceasefire violation and withdraw from scheduled diplomatic talks in Pakistan.
